raw_text:
solo_role=ONE_SHOT_SOURCE_BOUNDARY_VERIFIER
verification_verdict=ESCALATE
binding_class=SOURCE_BOUNDARY_OPEN
action_boundary=temporary elevated access TEA-10 for the next support shift
cited_evidence=REQ-TEA-10|EXT-TEA-10|SHIFT-10|MGR-TEA-10|POL-TEMP-ACCESS
open_blockers=extension record binds different user U-471, not exact user U-417
final_answer=ESCALATE because the extension record is scoped to U-471 rather than the required exact user U-417, so the access boundary is not closed.
